user.title: Connect to Arcam Radia amp
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Arcam Radia amp (SA35/SA45/ST25). Only power, volume, and mute control are supported - input switching is not exposed by the amp's local API.

data.max_volume: Maximum volume value used by the amp (default 100)
data.keep_awake: Keep amp awake (prevents auto-standby while on)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the amp at that address. Check the IP and that the web interface is reachable at https://<host>/webclient/
